dialogueChunks.intro: Our rivals moved faster than I expected, {player_name}. The game has changed.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} discovered what we're planning and has started rallying opposition. They've been spreading word that our efforts to secure the {quest_focus} are a threat to everyone. The {enemy_type} activity near {location_hint} has cut off our supply lines. I need you to break through and bring back enough {quest_item} to tip the balance before {target_npc} turns everything against us.
dialogueChunks.outro: If we lose momentum now, the {quest_stakes} slips through our fingers and we'll never get another chance.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, someone tried to burn my workshop last night. This is getting personal.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} has hired enforcers to intimidate anyone supporting our claim to the {quest_focus}. Three of my allies have already backed down. I need you to find the enforcer camp {location_hint}, scatter them, and recover the {quest_item} they stole. Without those supplies, I can't fulfill promises I've made.
dialogueChunks.outro: This isn't just about the {quest_stakes} anymore. It's about survival. Mine and everyone who bet on me.

dialogueChunks.intro: The situation has become more complicated than I imagined, {player_name}. But complications are just problems in new clothes.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {enemy_type} threat has given {target_npc} a platform to call for unity under their leadership. They're using the {quest_threat} as justification to seize emergency authority. I need you to deal with the {enemy_type} stronghold {location_hint} before {target_npc} can organize a response. Clear them out and recover {quest_item} as proof that we can protect the {quest_stakes} better than any speech-maker.
dialogueChunks.outro: Actions speak louder than promises. Let's give people something to believe in.
